faqs.question: Give me an overview of the AI Customer Agent service.
faqs.answer: Our AI Customer Agent provides 24/7 multilingual support across WhatsApp, social media, and your website. It handles FAQs, order tracking, and complaint resolution in both Arabic and English, instantly improving customer satisfaction.

faqs.question: Which social platforms can the AI Agent handle?
faqs.answer: Our AI Customer Agents can be deployed on WhatsApp, Instagram DMs, FaceBook Messenger, and even integrated via standard SMS, responding to Qatari customers in both Arabic and English.

faqs.question: Does it speak Arabic and English?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our AI models are optimized to fluently speak both English and Arabic, effortlessly switching languages based on the customer's initial message to provide a deeply localized experience for the GCC market.
